notes: This site does NOT use a traditional dropdown megamenu. Navigation is a full-height right-side off-canvas slide-in panel (410px wide, teal bg rgb(22,208,197)).
All sub-menus use a slide-in-panel pattern: clicking a category slides the current list away and reveals sub-items with a back arrow button.
Maximum nesting depth is 3 levels (e.g., Equipment → Ships → individual ship classes).
No images, search forms, or locale selectors in the navigation panels.
The Careers section has CTA buttons at the bottom: 'Find a role' and 'Start your application' — styled as bordered buttons.
The 'Global operations' sub-menu under 'Locations & Operations' has empty/broken items (links to / with no text) — appears to be a data issue on the source site.
Navigation pattern: hamburger click → off-canvas panel slides in from right → category click → sub-panel slides in → back arrow returns to parent level.
